case_title: HUNG MAI CORP VS. MARY LOU CHRISTIE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUNG MAI CORP DBA   FLOOR PROS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHRISTIE, MARY LOU $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,075.00, DEFENDANT SIGNED CONTRACT WITH PLAINTIFF TO HAVE FLOORING INSTALLED. DEFENDANT REFUSED TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO REPAIR SO PREVENTED PLAINTIFF FROM ATTEMPTING TO FIX ISSUE. DEFENDANT OBLIGATED TO PAY ON CONTRACT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
